name: App Workspace Sidebar
uri: N/A — embedded navigation panel rendered inside the authenticated app layout; not a routed page
notes: The sidebar is a stateless presentational component — activeSection and onNavigate are fully controlled by the parent (App.jsx class component state).
The 'tags' section (🏷️ Tags) is exclusive to the sidebar; Header.jsx duplicates Documents/Upload/Search navigation but omits Tags.
A TOGGLE_SIDEBAR Redux action exists in uiReducer.js, but the Sidebar component does not read ui.sidebarOpen from the Redux store — collapse/expand behavior is not implemented.
The sidebar is only rendered when AuthContext.isAuthenticated === true; App.jsx returns <LoginForm /> instead when unauthenticated.
